'''Haven''' was a small [[Planetoid/Legends|planetoid]]<ref name="TCSWE" /> located in the [[Minos Cluster/Legends|Minos Cluster]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].

==History==
During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Haven served as the site of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance's]] primary resistance center in the [[Minos Cluster/Legends|Minos Cluster]]. In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], shortly after the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]], the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Alliance Fleet]] regrouped at a [[Haven (rendezvous point)|rendezvous point]] near Haven. Following his [[Duel on Cloud City/Legends|duel]] with [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] on [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]], [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] received his [[Cybernetics/Legends|prosthetic]] [[Limb/Legends|hand]] while in [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] around Haven.<ref name="TCSWE" />

{{Moon-stub}}
